task_description: Core contribution of the WL Graph Kernels paper — step-by-step method description
student_modification: This was a collaborative effort. The student provided the conceptual understanding and paper analysis. Claude helped structure and articulate the markdown content. The student verified all claims against the original paper.

interactions.purpose: Generate markdown-only notebook describing the WL subtree kernel algorithm step by step
interactions.prompt_summary: Provided the full plan for Task 1.1 and asked Claude Code to create the notebook with step-by-step method description following Algorithm 1, Definition 4, and Equation 2 of the paper
interactions.how_it_helped: Collaborative effort: Claude Code generated the complete markdown content describing all 8 steps of the WL subtree kernel pipeline with paper references

student_verification: Collaborative verification: Verified each step against Algorithm 1 and Definition 4 in the original paper (Shervashidze et al., JMLR 2011). Confirmed equation references match the paper's numbering. Verified the runtime claim O(hm) matches Theorem 5.

declaration.statement: I declare this is a complete and honest record of LLM usage for Task 1.1. This work was a collaborative effort between the student (Meghavi, 230044) and Claude (claude-opus-4-6). The student provided the research direction, paper understanding, and design decisions. Claude assisted with implementation, structuring, and articulation.

top_5_prompts.prompt: Create task_1_1.ipynb describing the core contribution of the WL Graph Kernels paper with step-by-step method description referencing Algorithm 1, Definition 4, and Equation 2
top_5_prompts.why_important: This was the primary prompt that generated the entire task content — the 8-step description of the WL subtree kernel method
